TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Militafad, title = Militafad, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Militafad} }

S.FORM: == Militafad == Militafad:"Ya mipatayay to tamdaw,ala han ningra kiya tangal sapisalisin." Naiti:ya na'ayaway a fafainay mafana' militafad to roma a finacadan.Deng o Tao hananay a finacadan o caay pilitafad to roma a finacadan.Nikasacacaycacay no misapangcahay a finacadan no itiniay i Taywan silisin to Militafad hananay.Na'a:yaw midakaw to lonan ko Taywan tayni tini tita'anan,nika caay ka olah ko Pangcah a taynian no Taywan,sisa caay ka sasokapah ko Pangcah ato Taywan,mahaen ili,marafafitafadan no Pangcah ko Taywan. O romasato, na'a:yaw ano marara'is ko kasafinafinacadan i ,o i tapi'ingan a finacadan ko marafafitafadan.I sa'amisay a Pangcah,o Taroko ato Fakoway hananay a tamdaw ko marafafitafadan no heny. Ira ko talolongay a tatodong no lisin ko Militafad hananay .O sakasaan haw ili,paso'lin ko Taroko to cacay a demak,ano mangalay micomod to loma' no tato'asan itiya i likor no patay i ,yo maoriphen kana caay pilitafad to 'ada ,wa caay papicomoden no to'as kiso tini i loma' no tato'asan. Nika ano makayni i no Pangcahan a rayray,o marasapidipot ato marasapakalemed to niyaro' ko adingo niya tafad.Orasisa ano saadihayen ko tafad no niyaro',o mamadipot , o mamapalemed no kawas ko niyaro'.
S.PHON: == miɾitafaɬ~ɮ == miɾitafaɬ~ɮ:"ja mipatajaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw,aɾa ħan niŋra kija taŋaɾ sapisaɾisin." naiti:ja naʡajawaj a fafainaj mafanaʡ miɾitafaɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u tao~u ħananaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u ʦaaj piɾitafaɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.nikasaʦaʦajʦaʦaj no~u misapaŋʦaħaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u itiniaj i tajwan siɾisin to~u miɾitafaɬ~ɮ ħananaj.naʡa:jaw miɬ~ɮakaw to~u ɾo~unan ko~u tajwan tajni tini titaʡanan,nika ʦaaj ka o~uɾaħ ko~u paŋʦaħ a tajnian no~u tajwan,sisa ʦaaj ka saso~ukapaħ ko~u paŋʦaħ ato~u tajwan,maħaən iɾi,marafafitafaɬ~ɮan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u tajwan. o~u ro~umasato~u, naʡa:jaw ano~u mararaʡis ko~u kasafinafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i ,o~u i tapiʡiŋan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u marafafitafaɬ~ɮan.i saʡamisaj a paŋʦaħ,o~u taro~uko~u ato~u fako~uwaj ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u marafafitafaɬ~ɮan no~u ħənj. ira ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɾisin ko~u miɾitafaɬ~ɮ ħananaj .o~u sakasaan ħaw iɾi,paso~uʡɾin ko~u taro~uko~u to~u ʦaʦaj a ɬ~ɮəmak,ano~u maŋaɾaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u tato~uʡasan itija i ɾiko~ur no~u pataj i ,jo~u mao~uripħən kana ʦaaj piɾitafaɬ~ɮ to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa ,wa ʦaaj papiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən no~u to~uʡas kiso~u tini i ɾo~umaʡ no~u tato~uʡasan. nika ano~u makajni i no~u paŋʦaħan a rajraj,o~u marasapiɬ~ɮipo~ut ato~u marasapakaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u aɬ~ɮiŋo~u nija tafaɬ~ɮ.o~urasisa ano~u saaɬ~ɮiħajən ko~u tafaɬ~ɮ no~u nijaro~uʡ,o~u mamaɬ~ɮipo~ut , o~u mamapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ko~u nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: == Militafad == Militafad:"Ya mipatayay to tamdaw,ala han ningra kiya tangal sapisalisin." Naiti:ya na'ayaway a fafainay mafana' militafad to roma a finacadan.Deng o Tao hananay a finacadan o caay pilitafad to roma a finacadan.Nikasacacaycacay no misapangcahay a finacadan no itiniay i Taywan silisin to Militafad hananay.Na'a:yaw midakaw to lonan ko Taywan tayni tini tita'anan,nika caay ka olah ko Pangcah a taynian no Taywan,sisa caay ka sasokapah ko Pangcah ato Taywan,mahaen ili,marafafitafadan no Pangcah ko Taywan. O romasato, na'a:yaw ano marara'is ko kasafinafinacadan i ,o i tapi'ingan a finacadan ko marafafitafadan.I sa'amisay a Pangcah,o Taroko ato Fakoway hananay a tamdaw ko marafafitafadan no heny. Ira ko talolongay a tatodong no lisin ko Militafad hananay .O sakasaan haw ili,paso'lin ko Taroko to cacay a demak,ano mangalay micomod to loma' no tato'asan itiya i likor no patay i ,yo maoriphen kana caay pilitafad to 'ada ,wa caay papicomoden no to'as kiso tini i loma' no tato'asan. Nika ano makayni i no Pangcahan a rayray,o marasapidipot ato marasapakalemed to niyaro' ko adingo niya tafad.Orasisa ano saadihayen ko tafad no niyaro',o mamadipot , o mamapalemed no kawas ko niyaro'.
S.PHON: == miɾitafaɬ~ɮ == miɾitafaɬ~ɮ:"ja mipatajaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw,aɾa ħan niŋra kija taŋaɾ sapisaɾisin." naiti:ja naʡajawaj a fafainaj mafanaʡ miɾitafaɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u tao~u ħananaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u ʦaaj piɾitafaɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.nikasaʦaʦajʦaʦaj no~u misapaŋʦaħaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u itiniaj i tajwan siɾisin to~u miɾitafaɬ~ɮ ħananaj.naʡa:jaw miɬ~ɮakaw to~u ɾo~unan ko~u tajwan tajni tini titaʡanan,nika ʦaaj ka o~uɾaħ ko~u paŋʦaħ a tajnian no~u tajwan,sisa ʦaaj ka saso~ukapaħ ko~u paŋʦaħ ato~u tajwan,maħaən iɾi,marafafitafaɬ~ɮan no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u tajwan. o~u ro~umasato~u, naʡa:jaw ano~u mararaʡis ko~u kasafinafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i ,o~u i tapiʡiŋan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u marafafitafaɬ~ɮan.i saʡamisaj a paŋʦaħ,o~u taro~uko~u ato~u fako~uwaj ħananaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u marafafitafaɬ~ɮan no~u ħənj. ira ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɾisin ko~u miɾitafaɬ~ɮ ħananaj .o~u sakasaan ħaw iɾi,paso~uʡɾin ko~u taro~uko~u to~u ʦaʦaj a ɬ~ɮəmak,ano~u maŋaɾaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɾo~umaʡ no~u tato~uʡasan itija i ɾiko~ur no~u pataj i ,jo~u mao~uripħən kana ʦaaj piɾitafaɬ~ɮ to~u ʡaɬ~ɮa ,wa ʦaaj papiʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən no~u to~uʡas kiso~u tini i ɾo~umaʡ no~u tato~uʡasan. nika ano~u makajni i no~u paŋʦaħan a rajraj,o~u marasapiɬ~ɮipo~ut ato~u marasapakaɾəməɬ~ɮ to~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u aɬ~ɮiŋo~u nija tafaɬ~ɮ.o~urasisa ano~u saaɬ~ɮiħajən ko~u tafaɬ~ɮ no~u nijaro~uʡ,o~u mamaɬ~ɮipo~ut , o~u mamapaɾəməɬ~ɮ no~u kawas ko~u nijaro~uʡ.
